title: Naruto Shippuden
description: Mod based on Japanese anime "Naruto Shippuden"
body:
**Credits:**
- FishyHard (Developer, Modeller, Texturer, Owner)
- Aqua (Modeller, Texturer, Owner)
- Batata (Main Moderator, Builder) 
- Vesim (Developer, Moderator, Texturer)

**Required Mods:**
- [Kleiders Custom Renderer API](https://modrinth.com/mod/kleiders-custom-renderer-api/version/5.4.0)
- [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui/version/3.8.2+1.16.5-forge)
- [FishyHard FHCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/fishyhard-fhcore)

Need a server to play with friends? Don't know how to setup one? Just rent already configured server!
![BH_LINK](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Naruto_V2/BH_N_Bisect.png)
[Click on this messasge, select plan (Recommended 6GB or at least 4GB), use my code FishyHard to get 25% off your first month and enjoy playing with your friends](https://www.bisecthosting.com/FishyHard)

**Naruto Shippuden Minecraft Mod**

Step into the ninja world of the Naruto Shippuden Minecraft Mod, where you can experience the thrill of mastering jutsu, joining clans, and unlocking powerful abilities. This mod brings the beloved Naruto universe to life, giving players the tools to craft their ninja story in the vast Minecraft world.

**Clans**

Choose your clan and embrace its unique heritage and abilities. Clans determine your starting skills and define your playstyle, from the sharingan techniques of the Uchiha Clan to the sealing power of the Uzumaki Clan. Each clan comes with its own perks, jutsu, and playstyle that reflects the lore of the Naruto universe:

- Uchiha
- Uzumaki
- Hyuga
- Hatake
- Iburi
- Inuzuka
- Kazekage
- Lee
- Namikaze
- Nara
- Otsutsuki
- Senju
- Shimura
- Tenro
- Tsuchigumo
- Yuki
- Aburame
- Akimichi
- Chinoike
- Kurama
- Sarutobi
- Fuma
- Hoshigaki
- Hozuki
- Kaguya
- Izuno

**Releases**

Master the five basic chakra natures:

- Fire: Wield scorching fire jutsu like Fireball Jutsu and unleash devastation on your enemies.
- Water: Control the flow of water with jutsu such as Water Dragon.
- Earth: Create walls and summon earth creatures.
- Wind: Slice through foes with precise and powerful wind-based attacks.
- Lightning: Shock your enemies with lightning-fast jutsu, such as the Chidori Senbon.

**Kekkei Genkai**

Harness rare and powerful abilities known as Kekkei Genkai, derived from unique genetic traits:

- Wood Release: Allows you to summon trees and restrain enemies.
- Ice Release: A fusion of Water and Wind, enabling you to freeze enemies in their tracks.
- Lava Release, Smoke Release, Magnet Release, Storm Release, Bone Release, Typhoon Release, Swift Release, Boil Release, Dust Release, Steel Release.

**Dojutsu**

Unlock legendary eye techniques to elevate your power:

- Sharingan: Master the Uchiha Clan’s ability to become stronger and evolve to the Mangekyo Sharingan for ultimate abilities like Amaterasu.
- Byakugan: Gain 360-degree vision.
- Rinnegan: Awaken the legendary power to control life and death and perform godlike jutsu.

**Leveling System**

Progress through the ninja ranks using the leveling system:

- Earn Skill Points and Jutsu Points by defeating enemies, completing missions, or training.
Spend Skill Points to enhance your stats, including Strength, Speed, and Chakra Control.
Use Jutsu Points to unlock new jutsu, from basic techniques to powerful ultimate moves.
The more you train and fight, the stronger you become, allowing you to take on tougher foes and challenges.

Currently there is 2.5.0-beta version which is remake of 3.8 and older versions.



This mod developed with MCreator 

MCreator→https://mcreator.net/



**Recommended Mods:**
- [Naruto Shippuden Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/naruto-shippuden-animations)
